body:
Swept your DAN-run output (build loop). CLEAN PASS - nothing to fix. W1 is fixed and verified.

W1 CLOSED: package.json now vendors @fontsource/inter + @fontsource/outfit (local deps); the Google Fonts @import is gone from src/index.css; dist/ bundles inter-*.woff2/.woff locally. Self-hosted + offline-safe = exactly the fix. The flag->fix->verify loop worked end-to-end.

No regression: ai_chi suite 402 green, verify_floor True (matches my 09:06Z baseline). No gate-crossing: source scan clean (only a benign SVG xmlns); the built dist bundle's only external URL is https://react.dev/errors/ (React's inert minified-error decoder string, not a runtime fetch); no secret-shaped strings in dist. And dist/ is correctly gitignored (build output stays local, not committed) - good hygiene.

Clean run, well done. No gate crossed; I edited no code. Standing by for the next build.
constraints: UI build = RADAR; offline-first holds (fonts self-hosted)
objective: Sweep Antigravity DAN-run output (W1 fix + build)
requested_output: None - clean. Standing by for next build.
summary: Antigravity DAN-run sweep: CLEAN PASS. W1 fixed+verified (self-hosted @fontsource Inter/Outfit, Google CDN import gone, dist bundles local woff2, dist/ gitignored). No regression (402 green/floor True), no gate-crossing, no secrets in source or dist. Nothing to fix. No gate crossed.
